notes:
The game is using custom .NET 4.0 based launcher, so you need to install dotnet40 via winetricks.
Other than that it works great as it is just goldsrc mod.

1. Open YourPathToSteamLibrary/SteamApps/compatdata/223710/

2. Run WINEPREFIX=`pwd`/pfx winetricks dotnet40

3. Continue with installer

Now game should launch successfully. While it might throw a bunch of error at launcher startup it doesn't affect gameplay.
title: Cry of Fear

notes: I had to install dotnet40 package using Winetricks (as described by another reporter) to get the game to run. After that, on first run, there were some alert boxes saying something like "could not find appropriate runtime" (or something like that). I just pressed OK to each and the game screen resolution launcher loaded up. Here I had some other problems which may just be related to my laptop. I could only get the game to show anything besides a black screen by running in Windowed mode. In full screen mode I could hear sound and, initially, see a small loading screen but then the screen was black. However, in Windowed mode the game plays perfectly and I get no more error alert boxes popping up before launch.
title: Cry of Fear

notes: With 4.2-3 the game runs out of the box, the only Proton specific issue is that the source engine menu font is poorly rendered. However the game has many other bugs that also occur on windows (see https://cry-of-fear.fandom.com/wiki/Bugs_and_Glitches). I ran into the flashlight not working bug, and the fixes suggested for Windows did not work. So rating it silver because of a minor issue that occurs only with Proton. But game was practically unplayable after a certain point because of pre-existing bugs with the game.
title: Cry of Fear

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: i tried disabling D3d11 and using Wine D3d11 with no success. A few things didn't appear when the player had to photograph stuff at the start and the flashlight on the phone didn't work. I couldn't quite test performance as i am not playing that game without a flashlight, but it seemed fine. I haven't managed to get it working.
title: Cry of Fear
